checks.observed: Last-session review on vehicle topic lists 22 wrong-answer rows; each row shows question text, user's wrong pick marked תשובה שגויה, and correct answer marked תשובה נכונה, including our deliberate misses (e.g. אביזרים קשיחים, משענות הראש).
Scope toggle shows התרגול האחרון with data-active=true and aria-current=page; כל הזמנים links to ?scope=all with 23 mistakes (superset of 22 last-session).
Could not observe last-session empty state: seeded QA user has last-session mistakes on all four topics (vehicle 22, signs 1, safety 158, traffic-laws 379).
checks.reason: seeded user state — no topic with zero last-session mistakes without DB reset

checks.observed: Retry page has #quiz-container with data-quiz-mode=retry and data-total=22 matching last-session mistake count; first question matches review list (בלמים warning light).
Confirmed retry answer POSTed /api/quiz 200; no POST /api/progress; pre-existing quiz-resume key unchanged during retry (no new keys written).
Dashboard vehicle topic progress unchanged at 34% הצלחה and 36/106 questions before and after partial retry session.
Could not test retry redirect: all seeded topics have last-session mistakes so /retry loads quiz instead of redirecting to /review.
checks.reason: seeded user state — no topic with zero last-session mistakes

checks.observed: Zero error-level console entries across review and retry flow; only Vercel analytics debug logs in development.
Scope toggle uses aria-current=page on active option; review rows label תשובה שגויה/תשובה נכונה in text; h1 סקירת טעויות present; question images have alt תמונה המצורפת לשאלה.
Visible strings match he.json Review/Retry namespaces (סקירת טעויות, התרגול האחרון, כל הזמנים, חזרה על הטעויות); no raw keys or LTR breakage observed.
